allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('磁盘清理工具.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --netrc-optional -X POST https://api.github.com/user/repos -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"disk-cleaner","private":false,"description":"一键磁盘清理工具 - 垃圾清理与文件查找","auto_init":false}')

Bash(powershell -Command 'try { $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.DownloadString\('\\''https://api.github.com/zen'\\''\); Write-Host '\\''API OK'\\'' } catch { Write-Host '\\''API FAIL: '\\'' $_.Exception.Message }')

Bash(powershell -Command 'try {   Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Net.Http;   $handler = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler;   $handler.ServerCertificateCustomValidationCallback = { $true };   $client = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient\($handler\);   $client.Timeout = New-Object System.TimeSpan\(0,0,30\);   $resp = $client.GetAsync\('\\''https://github.com'\\''\).Result;   Write-Host $resp.StatusCode; } catch { Write-Host '\\''Error: '\\'' $_.Exception.Message }')
